---
title: "Flowchart"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# --- 1. INSTALL LIBRARY TAMBAHAN (JIKA BELUM ADA) ---
if (!require("DiagrammeRsvg")) install.packages("DiagrammeRsvg")
if (!require("rsvg")) install.packages("rsvg")
if (!require("DiagrammeR")) install.packages("DiagrammeR")

library(DiagrammeR)
library(DiagrammeRsvg)
library(rsvg)

# --- 2. DEFINISI OUTPUT PATH ---
# Perhatikan: Backslash (\) diubah menjadi Forward slash (/) agar R bisa membacanya
output_folder <- "C:/Users/adief/OneDrive/Dokumen/Semester 5/Data Mining 2/Week 14 (Final Project)"
output_filename <- "pipeline_flowchart.png"
full_path <- file.path(output_folder, output_filename)

# Pastikan folder tujuan ada, jika tidak buat foldernya
if (!dir.exists(output_folder)) {
  dir.create(output_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

# --- 3. BUAT FLOWCHART (DISIMPAN KE VARIABEL) ---
my_graph <- grViz("
digraph pipeline {

  # --- PENGATURAN UMUM ---
  graph [layout = dot, rankdir = TB, compound = true, splines = ortho]
  
  # Gaya Node Default
  node [shape = box, 
        style = 'filled', 
        fontname = 'Helvetica', 
        fontsize = 10,
        fillcolor = '#EDF2F7', 
        color = '#4A5568']
  
  # Gaya Edge Default
  edge [color = '#718096', penwidth = 1.5, arrowhead = vee]

  # --- 1. DATA INGESTION ---
  subgraph cluster_data {
    label = '1. Data Ingestion & Cleaning';
    style = dashed;
    color = '#A0AEC0';
    fontcolor = '#4A5568';
    
    raw_audio [label = 'Raw Audio (.mp3)\nDataset', shape = folder, fillcolor = '#FFFAF0']
    metadata [label = 'Metadata (.csv)', shape = note, fillcolor = '#FFFAF0']
    cleaning [label = 'Genre Mapping\n(Fixing labels to 9 Classes)', fillcolor = '#FEFCBF']
    
    {raw_audio, metadata} -> cleaning
  }

  # --- 2. AUDIO PROCESSING ---
  subgraph cluster_audio {
    label = '2. Audio Preprocessing Pipeline';
    style = dashed;
    color = '#A0AEC0';
    
    load [label = 'Load Audio\n(torchaudio)', fillcolor = '#C6F6D5']
    resample [label = 'Resample 16kHz\nConvert to Mono', fillcolor = '#C6F6D5']
    pad_cut [label = 'Duration Fix\n(Random Crop 5s / Val 30s)', fillcolor = '#C6F6D5']
    augment [label = 'Augmentation (Train Only)\n(Noise, Pitch, Time Stretch)', style='filled,dashed', fillcolor = '#9AE6B4']
    
    cleaning -> load
    load -> resample
    resample -> pad_cut
    pad_cut -> augment
  }

  # --- 3. FEATURE EXTRACTION ---
  subgraph cluster_feature {
    label = '3. Feature Extraction (VRAM Optimized)';
    style = solid;
    color = '#4299E1';
    penwidth = 2;
    
    stft [label = 'STFT\n(Short-Time Fourier Transform)', fillcolor = '#BEE3F8']
    mels [label = 'Mel Filter Bank\n(n_mels = 64, hop = 1024)', fillcolor = '#63B3ED', fontcolor='white']
    log [label = 'Logarithmic Scaling\n(Convert to dB)', fillcolor = '#3182CE', fontcolor='white']
    
    augment -> stft
    stft -> mels
    mels -> log
  }

  # --- 4. MODEL TRAINING & OPTIMIZATION ---
  subgraph cluster_training {
    label = '4. Training System & Models';
    style = dashed;
    color = '#A0AEC0';
    
    # Optimization Node
    optim [label = 'VRAM Optimization:\n1. Mixed Precision (FP16)\n2. Gradient Accumulation\n3. Cache Cleaning', 
           shape = note, fillcolor = '#FAF5FF', color='#805AD5']
    
    # Parallel Models
    subgraph cluster_models {
      label = '';
      style = invis;
      rank = same;
      
      m1 [label = 'VGGish\nProfessional', fillcolor = '#FED7D7']
      m2 [label = 'EfficientNet\nAudio', fillcolor = '#FED7D7']
      m3 [label = 'CRNN\nProfessional', fillcolor = '#FED7D7']
      m4 [label = 'Musicnn\nProfessional', fillcolor = '#FED7D7']
      m5 [label = 'CompactCNN\n(Lightweight)', fillcolor = '#FED7D7']
    }
    
    log -> {m1, m2, m3, m4, m5} [lhead=cluster_models]
    optim -> m1 [style=dotted, label=' applied to']
  }

  # --- 5. ENSEMBLE & OUTPUT ---
  subgraph cluster_output {
    label = '5. Ensemble & Prediction';
    style = dashed;
    color = '#A0AEC0';
    
    voting [label = 'Ensemble Strategy\n(Average & Weighted Voting)', shape = hexagon, fillcolor = '#FBD38D']
    output [label = 'Final Prediction\n(9 Music Genres)', shape = oval, fillcolor = '#F6AD55', fontcolor='white', penwidth=2]
    
    {m1, m2, m3, m4, m5} -> voting
    voting -> output
  }
}
")

# --- 4. EKSPOR KE PNG ---
# Langkah: Graph Object -> SVG String -> PNG File
cat("Sedang mengekspor gambar...\n")

svg_code <- export_svg(my_graph)
rsvg_png(charToRaw(svg_code), file = full_path, width = 2000) # Width 2000 agar resolusi tinggi

cat(paste0("✅ Berhasil disimpan di: ", full_path))
```
